summary: The brain monitor for cognitive health scores Discussion | Link
content: You track your steps. Your heart rate. Your calories. But what about your brain? Tacet gives you a daily cognitive fitness score and sleep quality tracking, drawn from the rhythm of how you tap your phone. Those timing patterns carry a surprisingly accurate signal about your cognitive state. No headset, no expensive hardware, no setup. Passive tracking, built on neuroscience research from Leiden University. Traditional brain monitoring is expensive. Tacet brings it to your pocket. Start today!
chineseSummary: 认知健康评分的大脑监测器 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 您跟踪您的脚步。你的心率。你的卡路里。但你的大脑呢？ Tacet 根据您敲击手机的节奏，为您提供每日认知健康得分和睡眠质量跟踪。这些时间模式携带着关于你的认知状态的令人惊讶的准确信号。没有耳机，没有昂贵的硬件，没有设置。被动跟踪，基于莱顿大学的神经科学研究。传统的大脑监测非常昂贵。 Tacet 将其放入您的口袋。从今天开始！
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
